name: Phosphor Border
description: Rounded corners and a window border carrying the Phosphor brand gradient from cyan to rose, flowing slowly around the frame with a soft gleam orbiting the band. The whole band dims when the surface loses focus. Width, corner radius, flow speed, gleam and the four gradient stops are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Roundness of the corners (px, 0 for square)

parameters.name: Flow speed
parameters.description: How many times per second the gradient flows around the border

parameters.name: Gleam speed
parameters.description: How many times per second the gleam travels around the border

parameters.name: Gleam strength
parameters.description: Brightness of the travelling gleam, 0 to disable

parameters.name: Opacity
parameters.description: Overall opacity of the border band

parameters.name: Gradient cyan
parameters.description: First stop of the brand gradient

parameters.name: Gradient blue
parameters.description: Second stop of the brand gradient

parameters.name: Gradient purple
parameters.description: Third stop of the brand gradient

parameters.name: Gradient rose
parameters.description: Fourth stop of the brand gradient
